findings.message: Adding the non-null required argument `description: str` to the existing `create_item` mutation is a breaking schema change. In Strawberry a bare `str` argument is non-null/required, so every existing client that calls `createItem(name: "...")` without `description` will now fail validation. There is no compatible path (no default, not nullable).
findings.suggestion: Make the new argument optional to preserve backwards compatibility: `description: str | None = None` (nullable with a default). Note the new input is also dropped on the floor — `repository.create_item(session, name)` never receives `description` — so it currently has no effect regardless.
